---
title: "Survival_QE"
author: "Chengyu_Du"
date: "2026-06-01"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(survival)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(gtsummary)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)
```

```{r}
#Load Data
dat <- read.csv("data/hf_survival-r.csv", check.names = FALSE)
head(dat)
```
```{r}
#Data Checking
#str(dat)
#colSums(is.na(dat))
```



```{r}
#Data Cleaning and Exploration

#Convert categorical variables to factors
names(dat)[names(dat) == "Time (months)"] <- "time"

dat$gender <- factor(
  dat$gender,
  levels = c("Female", "Male")
)

dat$smoking <- factor(
  dat$smoking,
  levels = c("Never", "Former", "Current")
)

dat$diabetes <- factor(
  dat$diabetes,
  levels = c(0, 1),
  labels = c("No", "Yes")
)

dat$nyha_class <- factor(
  dat$nyha_class, 
  levels = c("I", "II", "III", "IV"), 
  ordered = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# Save cleaned  data
dir.create("output", showWarnings = FALSE)
saveRDS(dat, file = "output/dat_clean.rds")
```



```{r}
dat$status_label <- factor(
  dat$status,
  levels = c(0, 1),
  labels = c("Censored", "Death")
)

theme_set(
  theme_classic(base_size = 9) +
    theme(
      axis.text = element_text(colour = "black"),
      axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.35),
      axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.35),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
      plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      strip.background = element_blank()
    )
)
```

```{r}
# A. Event status
p_event <- ggplot(dat, aes(x = nyha_class, fill = status_label)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill", width = 0.65, colour = "white", linewidth = 0.25) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Censored" = "#D8DEE3", "Death" = "#D77A61")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format()) +
  labs(
    tag = "A",
    x = "NYHA class",
    y = "Proportion",
    title = "Event status by NYHA class"
  )
```


```{r}
# B. Categorical covariates
p_gender <- ggplot(dat, aes(x = nyha_class, fill = gender)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill", width = 0.65, colour = "white", linewidth = 0.25) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Female" = "#D8DEE3", "Male" = "#6FA7B8")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format()) +
  labs(tag = "B", x = "NYHA class", y = "Proportion", title = "Gender")

p_smoking <- ggplot(dat, aes(x = nyha_class, fill = smoking)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill", width = 0.65, colour = "white", linewidth = 0.25) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Never" = "#D8DEE3", "Former" = "#8DAA91", "Current" = "#D77A61")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format()) +
  labs(x = "NYHA class", y = "Proportion", title = "Smoking")

p_diabetes <- ggplot(dat, aes(x = nyha_class, fill = diabetes)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill", width = 0.65, colour = "white", linewidth = 0.25) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("No" = "#D8DEE3", "Yes" = "#D77A61")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format()) +
  labs(x = "NYHA class", y = "Proportion", title = "Diabetes")

```

```{r}
# C. Continuous covariates
p_age <- ggplot(dat, aes(x = nyha_class, y = age)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.55, fill = "#EAF1F2", colour = "black", outlier.alpha = 0.4) +
  labs(tag = "C", x = "NYHA class", y = "Value", title = "Age")

p_bmi <- ggplot(dat, aes(x = nyha_class, y = bmi)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.55, fill = "#EAF1F2", colour = "black", outlier.alpha = 0.4) +
  labs(x = "NYHA class", y = "Value", title = "BMI")

p_ef <- ggplot(dat, aes(x = nyha_class, y = ejection_fraction)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.55, fill = "#EAF1F2", colour = "black", outlier.alpha = 0.4) +
  labs(x = "NYHA class", y = "Value", title = "Ejection fraction")

p_sodium <- ggplot(dat, aes(x = nyha_class, y = sodium)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.55, fill = "#EAF1F2", colour = "black", outlier.alpha = 0.4) +
  labs(x = "NYHA class", y = "Value", title = "Sodium")

p_cont <- (p_age + p_bmi) / (p_ef + p_sodium)

```


```{r}
# D. Creatinine before and after log transformation
p_creatinine_raw <- ggplot(dat, aes(x = nyha_class, y = creatinine)) +
  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.55,
    fill = "#EAF1F2",
    colour = "black",
    outlier.alpha = 0.4
  ) +
  labs(
    tag = "D",
    x = "NYHA class",
    y = "Value",
    title = "Raw creatinine"
  )

p_creatinine_log <- ggplot(dat, aes(x = nyha_class, y = log(creatinine))) +
  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.55,
    fill = "#EAF1F2",
    colour = "black",
    outlier.alpha = 0.4
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "NYHA class",
    y = "Value",
    title = "Log-transformed creatinine"
  )

p_creatinine <- p_creatinine_raw + p_creatinine_log
```


```{r}
figure1 <- (p_event + p_gender + p_smoking + p_diabetes) /
  p_cont /
  p_creatinine +
  plot_layout(
    heights = c(1.55, 1.65, 1.05)
  )

figure1

dir.create("figures", showWarnings = FALSE)

ggsave(
  "figures/figure1_exploratory.pdf",
  figure1,
  width = 8.2,
  height = 8.8
)

```
